## Checklist

- [ ] The action has a passing test workflow
- [ ] `README.md` is present with inputs, outputs, and a usage example
- [ ] All `uses:` are pinned to commit SHAs
- [ ] If the action is destructive, it defaults to dry-run
- [ ] `dist/` is rebuilt and committed (JS actions only)
